title: Deleting archives

posts.author: Josephine8 (Jo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I think it would be great to be able to delete archived items directly in the archive instead of having to restore then delete with the option to select multiple archived items.
Or alternatively it would be even better to set a deadline for items to be deleted after a certain amount of time archived.

posts.author: cherie.mak (Cherie Mak)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree - this can’t be a difficult feature to develop? It would be immensely help even if we could just move the archived items to “trash”.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be super helpful. We often have test boards that are archived instead of deleted. Maybe a feature in Tidy Up to give us the ability to trash selected archived boards?

posts.author: EdwardNjogu (Edward Njogu)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on if this feature is on the dev roadmap?
